idea-plugin.name: CodeSetu API Client
idea-plugin.description:
A Postman-style REST and WebSocket client for JetBrains IDEs.

Build, send, and organize HTTP requests; manage environments and variables; apply auth; and import existing Postman, OpenAPI, Insomnia, HAR, and cURL collections — all inside your IDE.

Part of the open-source CodeSetu project. Community: Discord
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial release: REST request builder, response viewer, collections, environments, and variables.
